creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
Cy Schubert <Cy.Schubert@komquats.com> writes:

> I'm unable to reproduce the problem. Please provide information as to how 
> you built the port.

As I already mentioned you need gcc43 *AND* libutempter both installed. So,
I tried to reproduce the problem under qemu-amd64. Here are the steps:

1. setup FreeBSD 8-CURRENT r189865 amd64 for serial console under qemu-amd64
2. `cvs -d... co ports' from local repo to populate /usr/ports
3. run qemu-system-x86_64
4. pkg_add -r gcc43 libutempter
5. cd ports/sysutils/screen; make CC=gcc43

BTW, I can reproduce it on one i386 box, too. Same <utempter.h>
detection problem with CC=gcc43.
